title: VariantStructuralFilesSelection
description: Structural code references injected into the system prompt via ## Structural References (this variant). Source of truth: src/lib/gen/scaffold-variants/structural-files.ts

sourceIds.description: Unique template-library entry IDs that contributed files.

totalChars.description: Sum of all excerpt character lengths.

sourceTitle.description: Human-readable title of the source template.

path.description: Relative file path within the source repo (e.g. app/layout.tsx).

reason.description: Why this file was selected (e.g. Layout and navigation reference).

excerpt.description: Budget-trimmed code excerpt injected into the prompt.

truncated.description: True if the excerpt was truncated to fit the budget.
